dashboard.ready_msg: Ready to plan your nutrition today?
dashboard.generate_desc: Let AI create your perfect menu for today based on your preferences.
dashboard.profile_cta: Keep your body profile current so the chat planner starts with the right context.
dashboard.history_cta: Review completed conversational sessions and their final meal plans.

meal_plan.title: Meal Planner
meal_plan.subtitle: AI-powered nutrition catering to your goals.
meal_plan.chat_subtitle: We understand your situation first, then generate one budget-safe daily meal plan.
meal_plan.session_tip: We start from your saved profile, then ask only for missing information.
meal_plan.goal_summary: Once your goal, budget, and preferences are clear, the final plan is generated in one step.
meal_plan.chat_placeholder: Tell me your budget, food preferences, or answer the latest question
meal_plan.draft_hint: Press Enter to send, Shift + Enter for a new line
meal_plan.crew_subtitle: See how the system split responsibilities, aligned constraints, and used DQN to build your plan.
meal_plan.crew_empty: We are still collecting your details. Collaboration events will appear once planning starts.
meal_plan.budget_safe_hint: The result below is constrained to your current budget.
meal_plan.session_failed: Could not create a session. Please try again.
meal_plan.message_failed: Could not send the message. Please try again.
meal_plan.ai_intro: Chat with our AI Nutritionist Team to get a personalized meal plan.
meal_plan.ready_desc: Adjust your preferences and click "Generate Plan" to get started.

shopping.title: Smart Shopping List
shopping.subtitle: Ingredients gathered from your meal plans.
shopping.empty_desc: Add items manually or generate from a meal plan.

profile.title: User Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage the server-backed body profile and default health goal used by the chat planner.
profile.name: Name
profile.auto_save_desc: Your changes are automatically saved to your browser.
profile.sync_hint: The nutritionist chat reads these fields directly and writes back missing values collected in conversation.
profile.chat_sync_title: Chat and profile stay in sync
profile.chat_sync_desc: If you provide age, height, weight, or activity level in chat, this page will reflect the latest saved values.
profile.save_failed: Could not save the profile. Please try again.

history.title: Meal History
history.confirm_clear: Are you sure you want to clear all history?
